# intzzzero apps

> Privacy-first macOS and iOS apps by intzzzero (Sooyoung Jeong). Every app is built to be local-only with no login and a minimal footprint — your data stays on your device. Apps are distributed free on the App Store (some with optional one-time purchases).

## Apps
- [TidyBox](https://app.intzzzero.dev/tidybox): macOS app that automatically organizes desktop files with smart rules, presets, and automation. Free with an optional one-time Pro upgrade.
- [Today Restart](https://app.intzzzero.dev/todayrestart): iOS local-only habit tracker for perfectionists — no streaks, no pressure, restart anytime. Free with an optional ad-removal purchase.
- [Meowstiny](https://app.intzzzero.dev/meowstiny): iOS daily cat-health diary — one-tap logging of litter, medication, weight and respiration, plus a vet-ready single-image report. Built for chronic conditions (FLUTD, CKD, diabetes, IBD). Free, no login, on-device. Official site: https://meowstiny.com

## Docs
- [TidyBox manual](https://app.intzzzero.dev/docs/tidybox)
- [Today Restart manual](https://app.intzzzero.dev/docs/todayrestart)
- [Meowstiny manual](https://app.intzzzero.dev/docs/meowstiny)
